title: athyrium × pseudoiseanum
intro: Athyrium × pseudoiseanum, also known as the Lady Fern, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the Athyrium genus, characterized by its delicate, lacy fronds. Traditionally, the Lady Fern has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations. The plant is rich in antioxidants, which can help protect against cell damage and promote overall health, leading to benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved immune function. In herbal preparations, the Lady Fern is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use is not as widely documented as some other medicinal plants.
